rows.label: tev021701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Fraisie about the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Fraisie if anything
is troubling her. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Fraisie for her
thoughts on the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Fraisie if anything
is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0001
rows.name:
For two years after we left
Earth, the Whale flew aimlessly
through the vastness of space.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0002
rows.name:
And after the xenoform attack,
we ended up crashing here on
Mira. What a miracle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0003
rows.name:
What further proof do you need that
our god is the Bringer of Miracles,
and that He protects humanity?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0004
rows.name:
I believe that the Bringer of
Miracles will continue to guide us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0005
rows.name:
So let us pray together
and show Him our thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0008
rows.name:
I've tried to tell the people who come to
this cathedral about the Bringer of Miracles,
but so many of them refuse to listen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0009
rows.name:
Mira is a livable planet, with
water to drink and air to breathe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0010
rows.name:
What are the odds that we could
crash-land on such a planet
without divine guidance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0011
rows.name:
The Bringer of Miracles is speaking
to me even still. "Gather followers
and bring them unto me," He says.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0012
rows.name:
I must hurry! I need to gather
kindred spirits and lead them
to the Bringer of Miracles![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0020
rows.name: The Ma-non are a wonderful race.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0021
rows.name:
Where others dismiss me out of
hand, the Ma-non listen to what I
have to say from start to finish.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0022
rows.name:
Of course, many tell me that
they cannot believe in an
unseen Bringer of Miracles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0023
rows.name:
But I know that spreading word of His
presence is the first step towards
Him being accepted as our savior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0027
rows.name:
More and more of the Ma-non have been
willing to hear what I have to say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0028
rows.name:
What can I do to convince them of the power
that the Bringer of Miracles wields?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0029
rows.name:
I asked that to the Bringer
of Miracles himself, and He
blessed me with an answer![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021701_MSG0030
rows.name:
I am having Maluttet assist me, for she always
listens so intently. Now it is only a matter of
time before the Bringer of Miracles becomes manifest![ST:wait ]
